What is the problem this feature will solve?

The current documentation on the "jyear" and "decimalyear" data types is unclear/nonexistent.
What are the differences between them, and when should one be used rather than the other?

I would argue that the name "jyear" itself is confusing, because it suggests something like the Julian Day Number expressed in years.

### Describe the desired outcome

_No response_
